race.comment: GARNACHO (11) has three placings from five outings this prep and last start finished a nose from the winner in second over 1600m at Pakenham. Drawn well and should be right there again. STAY SILENT (1) missed the placings two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1600m at Pakenham, beaten just 1.3 lengths. Drawn wide but rolls forward and has claims. GALLANT PRINCE (7) has placed in his past couple, well backed last start at Pakenham on similarly wet ground, getting into third. He won't need to improve much more. VERONA RUPES (10) resumes with the peaks to win, albeit over a bit further, watch the betting.
